case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. JUAN PICAZO JR. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED JUN-14-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PICAZO JR., JUAN
AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PICAZO JR., JUAN
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $246.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PICAZO JR., JUAN

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATIONS RE: VENUE & REDUCED FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PICAZO JR., JUAN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-09-2013
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PICAZO JR., JUAN $1,835.36 PRINCIPAL, $287.00 INTEREST, $246.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,368.36, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
